newsArray.description: Rahul Chahar returns to Surrey for final eight 2026 County Championship games after CSK stint, aiming to build on his record debut haul against Hampshire at the Oval.

newsArray.title: "Ben Sears been fit and playing consecutive games is a win": New Zealand head coach Rob Walter
newsArray.description: New Delhi [India], March 26 (ANI): New Zealand head coach Rob Walter feels having fast bowler Ben Sears fit for an entire series is among the major takeaways for Kiwi's from their five-match T20I series against South Africa. Sears was the joint-highest wicket-taker in the series with eight scalps in five games at an average of 14.50 and an economy rate of 6.44. 'First and foremostly for Searsy (Ben Sears)

newsArray.title: BCCI announces IPL 2026 second-phase schedule; 50 matches from April 13
newsArray.description: The BCCI has announced the schedule for the second phase of IPL 2026, with 50 league matches set to be played from April 13 to May 24 across 12 venues in India, starting with Sunrisers Hyderabad facing Rajasthan Royals.

newsArray.title: IPL 2026: Delhi Capitals’ five core players who could define their campaign
newsArray.description: Delhi Capitals' IPL 2026 season hinges on five key players. KL Rahul will anchor the top order. Axar Patel leads with all-round contributions. Mitchell Starc provides pace and wicket-taking spells. Kuldeep Yadav enforces control in the middle overs. David Miller finishes games under pressure. Their combined performance will be vital for Delhi's title aspirations.
creator: et online
